item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #387
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: I'm back to brighten the Mjonday (I hope!) with the 263st eromeme album.
item.description:
I'm back, thanks for your patience. I'm trying to fix little parts of my life and sometimes I have to step back from one thing or another to get something done. Practice what I preach and all that. So without further ado, here's the stuff. No eromeme OC, as usual.
Quexk
Dr. Beeeeees! Ok, so. I didn't think about a message. Sometimes I don't. But I've been busy trying to do some things for me. And I'm gonna keep trying. And that's a big deal. It's hard to try something new, and hard to try something old that you didn't do right the first time. Basically anything out of your comfort zone is a real PITA to motivate for. But ya gotta do it if you're gonna get better. And ya gotta do better because you're worth being your best self. Anyway, heres the archive! May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Images of Note: DID YOU FART?
item.description:
Kinda wild that.
I love memes you don't need to translate.
the C programming Language: Basically the Necronomicon.
clearly
Pee.
HELL YEAH
D:
AAAAAAAAAAA
YOU! STOP AND PAY ATTENTION
halp
:)
fart
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Que would happen if, wenn du open your computero, finde eine message in esta lingua? No est englando, no est germano, no est espano, no est franzo, no est keine known lingua aber du under stande! Wat happen so? Habe your computero eine virus catched? Habe du sudden BSE gedeveloped? No, du esse lezendo la neue europese lingua: de europanto! Europanto ist uno melangio van de meer importantes europese linguas mit also eine poquito van andere europese linguas, sommige latinus, sommige old grec. Also, Chaill you le Geama.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Meme Dump without the ad Pt.4
item.dc:creator: Iwastoldtherewouldbefun

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1194 (liking gap)
item.description:
Pippin let me sleep in for like two hours, holy crap. Anyway, let's get this bread.
I swing wildly between both of these.
I've learned that people do like me and being around me and I've decided to stop questioning it and trying to understand it and just go with it and enjoy it.
Oh thank God, these stones are gonna cure me and make me neurotypical. Who knew that it wasn't medications designed by scientists through science, and the cure to making me functional is gonna be... rocks.
It isn't what I need, what I need is money, but this would be nice.
Zooooooooooooom
Old news, but beautiful
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Satisfied Conure grunts while receiving scritches]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I haven't cried like this in 20 years
item.description: It's such a long story, I don't even know where to begin. There were so many little things going wrong at work. My boss and I opened the business in 2018 after working together before that. Years of blood, sweat and tears to make it work, and we had a great reputation. But he tended to bury his head in the sand over the little administrative things. Which over the years, became big issues because they weren't dealt with. We went from strength to strength and, from 2018 to 2022, went from just the 2 of us to 10 staff. But there was one in particular...we realised about 4 months in that she definitely wasn't going to work out. Never went so far as to warrant a warning, but the whole office environment became toxic as everyone was worried about her retaliations. He could have gotten rid of her with no consequences at that point, but he was too busy to think about it. She's been with us 2 years now. An incident happened last Thursday with her and I just couldn't take it any more. I walked out. Boss was sympathetic at first but when he realised I was sticking to my guns and I would not return if she was there, he got cold and rigid, wouldn't speak to me as a friend any more. I know why, she can easily sue him now if he fires her and he feels stuck. But I just can't do it any more. I am in a fortunate position where I don't have to immediately look for something else, but I am just devastated because I thought this was it, I have my job for life that I'm good at and I enjoy (when things are going well). I've been crying for 4 days straight. In theory I know I did the right thing, but this was the biggest part of my life. I guess I have a few weeks now to figure out who I am without a job. I am going to finally be assessed for autism/ADHD, so I've got that going for me. TL;DR OP is whining into the void, nothing to see here. FP edit: ...damn guys, you upvote the weirdest shit. Thank you all so much, between the comments to this post and talking to my mum today I am in so much of a better headspace than I was this morning. Time to teach myself to take it easy for a little while.
item.dc:creator: TealcPI

item.title: At the heart of right-wing populism is worsening inequality
item.description:
This is why these whackball populist scumbags are having a moment. You need to look past personalities and partisanship. Stop the ride-or-die support of political parties. The goal is simple: HEAL WIDESPREAD INJUSTICE. If a party, any party, refuses to do this, or offers only excuses, they do NOT deserve your support. “Just vote” has failed. Systemic crises need massive collective efforts to solve. If Trump were to get beamed up to a starship and vanish forever, it wouldn’t magically fix anything because he’ll just be replaced. He has equivalents in every country. Take to the streets. Withhold your support. You massively outnumber the wealthy. USE THAT. Source: https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/2020/02/11/income-inequality-un-destabilizing/
2/3 of Americans live paycheck to paycheck. More than 1 in 10 don’t know where their next meal is coming from. In other words, 3/4 of Americans are suffering at a time when the economy is booming. If may be too late to fix the system, but it’s worth a try. It has to be better than letting it all fall to shit. Or is this all falling on deaf ears?

item.title: Terrified dog quickly falls in love with her new family
item.dc:creator: ToloodeDoom

item.title: My entire life got nuked two years ago - and it turned out to be the best thing that ever happened to me.
item.description:
Buckle up cheese bags, because brevity has never existed in my wheelhouse? After fertility treatments - my then husband of 7 years (12 years w/dating) said he wanted a divorce when our baby was 8 weeks old and moved across the country.
I had no time to piss and moan or even really grieve - as I was now the sole caretaker of an infant. I hiked up my big girl panties and got to work rebuilding my life for my son.
I came across this meme not long after - and it changed something in me. I realized that I am all my son has, and I needed to start taking my health very seriously. So for an entire year I devoted myself to focusing only on my son and I (no dating - no distractions - not that I really had time for that anyway!)
I committed to figuring out my complex health issues, seeing a therapist regularly, and have learned to sit in and feel my emotions rather than intellectualize and bury them.
I came across this meme not long after - and it changed something in me. I realized that I am all my son has, and I needed to start taking my health very seriously. So for an entire year I devoted myself to focusing only on my son and I (no dating - no distractions - not that I really had time for that anyway!) (originally posted by @megasaurusrex on 2023-11-26 03:52:35)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: What's that!? My birthday is on RHM!?? Costume pics! Costume pics for everyone!!!!
item.description:
The only technical selfie. BUT my friend Mallorie did my makeup and they deserve to be in this list of favorites!!!
Ending with cat tax. Like a good imgurian. Anyway, happy birthday me. You are so different than you were a year ago... wildly different than you were two years ago... phenomenally different than 3 years ago. I don't wish you stagnation, but I do wish you rest. You've done work. You've built community. Don't stop!!! But give yourself grace. You can rise more slowly now and enjoy the weirdo you've finally embraced. Love you!!! **Most viral edit!** The deal is, I always post the song I was listening to when I got the notification! So here it is! And thanks for being cool on ma birthday! https://open.spotify.com/track/77G0k1La0c5Dw8bAFANcyp?si=ENVSZYnuSs21tYIC3PyynA
item.dc:creator: AerinLovesCats
